name: Agent Runtime 每日运行摘要
prompt:
Generate a daily summary of Agent Runtime execution.

Steps:
1. Read the execution log at /Users/xiamingxing/Workspace/agent-runtime/execution_log.jsonl
2. Analyze the last 24 hours of task runs
3. Report: how many tasks ran, success rate, total tokens used, any failures
4. If everything was fine (no failures), output [SILENT]
5. If there were failures, output a brief alert summary
